steps.title: Identify the key signal
steps.content: The first sentence makes a general claim (the station “does much to serve” the community), and the second sentence provides specific examples (broadcasting news, music, and language programming). This is an elaboration pattern: a general claim followed by supporting details.

steps.title: Match the transition to the pattern
steps.content: ”Specifically” introduces examples clarifying a preceding claim. Instead marks contrast, Nevertheless marks concession, and As a result marks causation—none of which fit. That matches choice C — C is correct.
